items.title: Anfernee Simons on Jaylen Brown, after they were teammates in Boston last season:
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Anfernee Simons on Jaylen Brown, after they were teammates in Boston last season: 

He’s going to guard the best player and go out there and give you 30…So he’s going to come in and bring that championship mentality from Day 1 and try to instill that in the team.”

items.title: Anfernee Simons says his left wrist injury is “pretty much completely healed now.” Simons says he hasn’t felt anything there in a long time.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons says his left wrist injury is “pretty much completely healed now.” Simons says he hasn’t felt anything there in a long time.

items.title: Anfernee Simons said Jameer Nelson called his parents to recruit him. Simons had high praise for all of the Sixers' Big 4. Mentioned watching Jaylen Brown's two-way prowess up close last season. Said he's happy to get the catch-and-shoot opportunities Joel Embiid will provide.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons said Jameer Nelson called his parents to recruit him. Simons had high praise for all of the Sixers' Big 4. Mentioned watching Jaylen Brown's two-way prowess up close last season. Said he's happy to get the catch-and-shoot opportunities Joel Embiid will provide.

items.title: On his fit with Joel Embiid, Anfernee Simons says “he’s a force in himself” and that he can take advantage of the attention always being on Embiid. “That makes the game easier for me… I love to get catch-and-shoots if that’s what the game allows me to get.”
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: On his fit with Joel Embiid, Anfernee Simons says “he’s a force in himself” and that he can take advantage of the attention always being on Embiid. “That makes the game easier for me… I love to get catch-and-shoots if that’s what the game allows me to get.”

items.title: Anfernee Simons suggested that VJ Edgecombe reminds him of Jaylen Brown in some ways — talked about them sharing a willingness to do whatever it takes to win and compete on both ends of the floor. “He can be a pretty special player.”
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons suggested that VJ Edgecombe reminds him of Jaylen Brown in some ways — talked about them sharing a willingness to do whatever it takes to win and compete on both ends of the floor. “He can be a pretty special player.”

items.title: Anfernee Simons is eager to play on and off the ball with the Sixers. He said he knows Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe have handled major workloads and he is here to relieve them of some pressure.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons is eager to play on and off the ball with the Sixers. He said he knows Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe have handled major workloads and he is here to relieve them of some pressure.

items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons says he wanted to play for the Sixers after Jameer Nelson called his parents and he talked to Nick Nurse. He thought it was the best fit for him as far as positional need and competing for a championship.

New: A film breakdown of Anfernee Simons, whose truly elite three-point shooting will provide a major boost for the Sixers.

However, the rest of Simons' game is... imperfect.

The Sixers are adding a top-flight shooter to their rotation. But at what cost?

items.title: Lost in last night’s hysteria: Sixers did really good work after opening up the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception. It wasn’t going to be easy to find a better pair than Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr. with $15 million. I think getting Dean Wade and Anfernee Simons qualifies.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Lost in last night’s hysteria: Sixers did really good work after opening up the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception. It wasn’t going to be easy to find a better pair than Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr. with $15 million. I think getting Dean Wade and Anfernee Simons qualifies.

items.title: Anfernee Simons had interest from the Philadelphia 76ers, Golden State Warriors, Miami Heat, Denver Nuggets, Dallas Mavericks, and Indiana Pacers, league sources said. Simons ultimately agreed to a two-year, $12.3 million deal, including a player option, as ESPN first reported.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons had interest from the Philadelphia 76ers, Golden State Warriors, Miami Heat, Denver Nuggets, Dallas Mavericks, and Indiana Pacers, league sources said. Simons ultimately agreed to a two-year, $12.3 million deal, including a player option, as ESPN first reported.

items.title: A strong move from the Sixers to bolster their bench and add much-needed three-point shooting with Anfernee Simons. His 2025-26 season shows he can thrive in the role he is set to inherit in Philadelphia.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
A strong move from the Sixers to bolster their bench and add much-needed three-point shooting with Anfernee Simons. His 2025-26 season shows he can thrive in the role he is set to inherit in Philadelphia.

The Sixers have fired their free-agency bullets:

items.title: Love that Anfernee Simons contract for the Sixers. What a killer get to give them a third guard.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Love that Anfernee Simons contract for the Sixers. What a killer get to give them a third guard.

Looks like he'll get the rest of the NTMLE (splitting it with Dean Wade), which means that Ariel Hukporti's contract will probably come out of the Bi-Annual Exception.

items.title: My thoughts on what the Celtics signing Mike Conley could mean for a potential Anfernee Simons reunion:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
My thoughts on what the Celtics signing Mike Conley could mean for a potential Anfernee Simons reunion:

One can't ignore financial side of roster building, or that teams must plan with more than one year in mind. However, to me, this largely depends on Payton Pritchard's role next season.
